published.text:
### Hero
Heading: AI Automation Consultant for Canadian Businesses
Body: Same bottlenecks whether you are in Vancouver, Toronto, Montreal, or a town of 10,000. Leads go cold. Appointments get missed. Your team spends half the day on admin that should run itself. We build AI-powered automations that handle the repetitive work so your people focus on revenue.
Sub: Below: what we automate, which Canadian industries see the best results, how remote delivery works, and how to tell if this is the right fit.

### Core sections
- These automations work the same whether you are in Alberta, Ontario, BC, or the Maritimes. The operational bottlenecks are universal:
- Lead follow-up and response
- Appointment scheduling
- CRM cleanup and automation
- AI voice agents

### FAQ
Subhead: Practical answers about working with an AI automation consultant in Canada

### Final CTA
Heading: Ready to automate the busywork?
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We will look at your current operations, identify the highest-impact automation opportunities, and give you a clear picture of what it would take.

edits.description: Published as part of the bounded first programmatic SEO batch for dmytroai.com.
Structured for both SEO and GEO: direct answer opening, sectioned decision content, FAQ, and proof-adjacent linking.
Avoids fake case studies or invented industry results.
Written for commercial intent, not generic educational traffic.
